## TL;DR
Plans X and Y have irreducible trade-off between security audit posture and oncall load.
[stance: accept]

## Argument
Trade-off matrix:

| Option | security | oncall |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Plan X | prefer   | oppose |
| Plan Y | accept   | prefer |

No dominant option emerges. Plan Y is the safest compromise if leadership accepts the
audit-granularity trade. Plan X is right if leadership accepts the temporary oncall
burden during transition.
